attributes.title: [HAProxy OTel] Backend
attributes.description: Per-backend aggregate latency, error breakdown, session saturation, server selection distribution, retries, and redispatches.

params.markdown:
## [HAProxy OTel] Backend

Per-backend aggregate metrics for server pools:
- Latency (connection, queue, response, session time)
- Error breakdown (connection, response, denied)
- Session saturation and server selection
- Retries and redispatches

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.active IS NOT NULL
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.connections.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.connections.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.responses.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors))

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched))
| EVAL total = COALESCE(retries, 0) + COALESCE(redispatches, 0)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched))
| EVAL total = COALESCE(retries, 0) + COALESCE(redispatches, 0)

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND (haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.sessions.average IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.connections.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.requests.average_time IS NOT NULL)
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), sess_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.average)), conn_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.connections.average_time)), queue_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.requests.average_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND (haproxy.responses.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.sessions.average IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.connections.average_time IS NOT NULL OR haproxy.requests.average_time IS NOT NULL)
| STATS resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), sess_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.average)), conn_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.connections.average_time)), queue_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.requests.average_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Error Breakdown by Backend Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), denied = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.denied)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL denied = COALESCE(denied, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), denied = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.denied)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL conn_err = COALESCE(conn_err, 0)
| EVAL resp_err = COALESCE(resp_err, 0)
| EVAL denied = COALESCE(denied, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.server_selected.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.server_selected.total IS NOT NULL
| STATS selections = SUM(RATE(haproxy.server_selected.total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND" AND haproxy.sessions.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL retries = COALESCE(retries, 0)
| EVAL redispatches = COALESCE(redispatches, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), haproxy.proxy_name
| EVAL retries = COALESCE(retries, 0)
| EVAL redispatches = COALESCE(redispatches, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active)), req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)), resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE haproxy.service_name == "BACKEND"
| STATS active = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.active)), req_rate = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.total)), resp_time = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(haproxy.responses.average_time)), conn_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.errors)), resp_err = SUM(RATE(haproxy.responses.errors)), retries = SUM(RATE(haproxy.connections.retries)), redispatches = SUM(RATE(haproxy.requests.redispatched)), sessions = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(haproxy.sessions.count)) BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.addr
| SORT req_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50
